Government Circular: -
Considering the need for farm roads to reach agricultural land in the state, Maharashtra Land Revenue
Section 143 of the Code, 1966 provides for the provision of roads. The Maharashtra Land Revenue Code,
The main purpose of granting road rights under Section 143 of the 1966 Act was to give a fair share to the land concerned.
This is to provide reasonable access. However, it has been observed that, to some extent -
It has the tendency to ask for a new route even if the road to its farm does exist.
Accordingly, if the farmer has a road to his farm, the situation is new.
